transcript.clean_text: Climbing the Mlau in the Arden. This is roughly what the 200 participants can expect this year. It goes up by almost 4,000 m and 10 cents will have to be passed on the 258 km long track. A challenge fit for Alejandro Valverde, recent winner at the War of Vi favorite for a fourth success here on the oldest of the spring classics. But Leech Bastonia Leech isn't all about climbing and the breakaway can seem tempting. This is what eight men choose to do and they will take a lead of up to 13 minutes mid race. Amongst them are three Frenchmen. The Kiwi Aron Gate from Aqua Blue and Thiago Mashado from Kusha. Behind Movi Star has to live up to expectations and starts the hunt. Hard work on the Bavo Ascent and the Fermy Bear reduces the gap to less than 6 minutes before getting to the sixth difficulty of the day, the Colosier. But this 103rd edition will change face after the mythical. Antony Perez attacks his fellow escapees and tries a solo run and the pack starts to react. Also, Diego Elissi from team Emirates tries his luck and 35 km before arrival, the lead of the escape group has dwindled to less than 4 minutes. On the cut de la Rosho Fukong and its 11% climb, Stfan Rosetto catches up to his teammate who cannot follow him. The Frenchman from Kofidis tries it solo, but would soon be joined by Tim Wellins, who leaves the other favorites behind. David Formulo is the next to give it a try. He briefly takes the lead, but under the red flame, the Italian is powerless versus first Martin, then Alejandro Valverde. The Spaniard seems fresher on the final send to ants. And my the Spaniard seems fresher on the final send to Ans. And Martin cannot follow Valverde who proves to be in great shape and irresistibly rides to victory 2 days from the 37th birthday. Nearly 24 hours after the tragic death of Mikas Garponi, the tribute of his peers before starting the race was touching. The pack gathered with his former teammates and held a minute of silence before breaking out in thunderous applause for the former winner of the JRO. Alejandro Valverde has decided to give the earnings of this race to the family of the cheerful Italian. It was a terrible sorrow to learn of Mike's death. I was shaken. And I wasn't the only one. The team was shaken. the public and the entire cycling world. I dedicate this victory to Mik and his family. After winning the flesh wallon, Alejandro Valverde has also made Lee his playground. This fourth victory on the old lady brings the man from movie star even closer to cycling legend Eddie Merks. Five-time champion here between 1969 and 1975. Seventh at the Murvi, Misha Priyatkovski is today rewarded with a place on the podium right behind Dan Martin. The first edition of the women's race sees another victory by Anna Thunder. Just like on the fleshwalon, the Olympic champion finishes solo ahead of her teammate from Bill Stolman's Elizabeth Dan. The Dutch suffered no competition in the Ardans this year. Leege was the closing point of the legendary spring classics. Now the preparation for the tour to France begins especially on the criterion doine between the 4th and the 11th of June.
